# Portugal Active — Luxury Private Villas & Experiences in Portugal

> Portugal Active operates 50+ private villas across Portugal as luxury private hotels — with dedicated concierge, private chef, and curated adventure experiences. Book direct for best rates.

## Services
- Luxury villa rentals across Minho Coast, Porto & Douro, Lisbon, Alentejo, and Algarve
- Adventure experiences: horseback riding, canyoning, surfing, sailing, e-bike tours, stand-up paddle, hiking
- Private chef and in-villa dining
- Concierge planning and bespoke itineraries
- Private events: weddings, corporate retreats, celebrations

## Key Facts
- Founded 2017 in Viana do Castelo, Portugal
- 50+ operated private homes
- Each home managed with hotel-standard service (47-point checklist)
- Available in 5 regions: Minho, Porto, Lisbon, Alentejo, Algarve
- Direct booking — no middleman markup
- Multilingual team: English, Portuguese, Spanish, French, German

## Contact
- Website: https://www.portugalactive.com
- Email: info@portugalactive.com
- Phone: +351 927 161 771
- WhatsApp: +351 927 161 771

## Experience Prices (per person)
- Horseback Riding: from €75
- Canyoning: from €65
- Hike, Dive & Dine: from €95
- Stand-Up Paddle: from €45
- Can-Am Buggy: from €120/buggy
- Sailing: from €85
- E-Bike Tours: from €55
- Surf Lessons: from €60
